origin.rebirth: Rostam returns in PersiaNexus after thousands of years to protect the balance between light and darkness.

story.intro: When darkness awakened across the worlds, an ancient energy from Persia called the Guardian Flame searched for a warrior worthy of carrying its power. From the legends of old, Rostam was reborn.
story.mission: Protect the human world and unite ancient wisdom with future technology.
story.enemy: The Shadow Lords who seek to erase the memory of ancient civilizations.

powers.name: Guardian Strength
powers.description: Supernatural strength inherited from ancient Persian energy.

powers.name: Zahak Slayer Spirit
powers.description: The ability to fight darkness and destroy corrupted powers.

powers.name: Divine Armor
powers.description: Creates an invisible energy armor around his body.

powers.name: Ancient Wisdom
powers.description: Uses forgotten knowledge of Persian heroes.

cinematic.scene: Rostam appears in a destroyed future city, surrounded by darkness. Ancient Persian symbols activate and his legendary armor awakens.
